---
title: "Élise Charlotte Otté"
---

## Élise Charlotte Otté

**Dates:** (Denmark <i>c.</i> 1820-1903 Surrey)

### Description

writer and translator

### Biography

She was the author of <i>Scandinavian History</i> (London: Macmillan 1874).

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 8 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
